item.title: Outward 2 has been delayed to 2027
item.content:encoded: Outward 2 has been delayed to 2027 - Aran Suddi
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Microsoft reaffirm that Gears of War E Day and Clockwork Revolution are exclusive
item.content:encoded:
Xbox Chief Strategy Officer Matthew Ball has shut down any gossip that Gears of War E Day and Clockwork Revolution would lose their Xbox exclusive status.

“These rumours are false. Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution will stay exclusive,” he posted on X. “There are no conversations and have been no conversations to “reverse course.” And as we said last week, players can continue to expect signature exclusives from us every year.”

So there you have it, Gears of War E Day and Clockwork Revolution are exclusive.

Just the same as Indiana Jones and Starfield were never, ever,  coming to PlayStation, and coming from a company that, last week, revealed a new game from a team they are about to shut down. 

Source: X



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/06/16/microsoft-reaffirm-that-gears-of-war-e-day-and-clockwork-revolution-are-exclusive/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
